form.formComment: Backs up 3 days after failing to impress last start; 9th (Sr2) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 30 m by Cardigan Dan (2:47.50) in NR 58 to 66 on April 4 at $5. Showed ability the outing before when he won by 1.5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Melton (2:40.10) beating Sea Fury in 0W/15 0K stake on March 21 at $1.45 at the bell was leading 1.68. Should be in the finish.

Should be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in on the first turn, inconveniencing Sea Fury.
Hung in approaching the home turn on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Meets My Ultimate Jimmy again; was restrained, when 25 metres eighth at this track over 2190m in a NR 65 or better race on March 27. This looks a far sterner test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Meets My Ultimate Jimmy again; was restrained, when 25 metres eighth at this track over 2190m in a NR 65 or better race on March 27. This looks a far sterner test.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in under pressure at the 400m, inconveniencing The Steel Dragon.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 3rd (Fr6) over 2190m after showing early speed at this track was 2nd-4 at the bell, beaten 9 m by My Ultimate Jimmy (2:40.40) in NR 65 or better on March 27 at $6. Two runs back won by 10 m when quickly away, (Fr6) at this track (2:09.50) beating Cemetery Bay in NR 65 or better on March 20 at $10 at the bell was leading 1.4. One of the better chances.

As the field raced into the first turn.

form.formComment: Recent efforts have been impressive. Last start a big 7 m win as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr5) at this track (2:40.40) beating Cemetery Bay in NR 65 or better on March 27 at $1.45 at the bell was leading 4. Bright prospects again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard in the score up.
Raced roughly under pressure in the home straight.
Paced roughly over the final stages.

form.formComment: Second up after running 4th (Fr4) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo, beaten 7 m by Dangerous (1:57.20) in NR 65 or better on March 25 at $8. Prefer others.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Second up after running 4th (Fr4) over 1650m after showing early speed at Bendigo, beaten 7 m by Dangerous (1:57.20) in NR 65 or better on March 25 at $8. Prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted out in the back straight. Tired, beaten 90m.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 2240m at Melton was 2nd-1.26 at the bell, beaten 8 m by Meteor Moth (2:39.50) in NR up to 100 on March 28 at $3.30. At the start before 7th (Fr1) over 1609m at Menangle beaten 8 m by Helluva (1:50.30) in No NR on March 14 at $12. Deserves another chance.

At the start before 7th (Fr1) over 1609m at Menangle beaten 8 m by Helluva (1:50.30) in No NR on March 14 at $12. Deserves another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up over the final 50m and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Five-year-old entire is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at Melton. Last start won by 6 m when quickly away, (Fr5) at Melton (2:39.50) beating Ghost Of Time in NR up to 100 on March 28 at $3.60 at the bell was leading 1.26. Hard to beat.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in when placed under pressure from the 300m.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Sr1) over 2680m at Terang beaten 12 m by Jilliby Nitro (3:15.60) in No NR on March 27 at $34. Two runs back 7th (Fr1) over 1720m at Melton was 7th-11.99 at the bell, beaten 13 m by Fighter Command (1:59.00) in No NR on March 21 at $15. Has claims.

form.formComment: Comes here in the right form. Won by 1.5 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr7) at Bendigo (1:57.20) beating Western Sonador in NR 65 or better on March 25 at $1.85. Two runs back 9th (Fr6) over 1720m after being wide early at Melton beaten 21 m by Petracca (1:58.10) in No NR on December 13 at $31. Will be better for that run and is a top winning chance again.
